economic_notes: Nation operates Petro Gas Bar, Club SAPP, The Loonie Bin Gaming Lounge, and Sapotaweyak Internet Services. Two government business partnerships: Aseneskak Casino Limited Partnership and Mahihkan Bus Lines LP. VLT commitments of $168,532 annually at Club SAPP and The Loonie Bin Gaming Lounge. New Water Treatment Plant under construction (in progress assets of $13.9M).
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Nation is in Manitoba. Net debt position of $3,917,511. Large construction in progress of $13,934,475 related to New Water Treatment Plant. Unexpended funding balance of $8,419,597 treated as deferred revenue/liability. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Aseneskak Casino Limited Partnership and Mahihkan Bus Lines LP. Ten entities fully consolidated. Contingent liability of $298,853 related to ISC social services funding recoveries. Other revenue of $13,386,081 is large and likely includes gaming/enterprise revenues from consolidated entities. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + Health Canada + MKO + Province of Manitoba + CMHC = 26,258,220 + 4,747,638 + 627,130 + 830,547 + 399,571 = 32,863,106. OSR = 42,723,271 - 32,863,106 = 9,860,165 (includes rental income, other revenue, less loss from GBEs and net transfer to unexpended funding).
